operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Ceasefire Holds Tenuously; Board of Peace Presses Hamas to Disarm
heroSubtitle: Rafah crossing reopened; 687+ Palestinians killed since October ceasefire; Hamas awaits disarmament proposal terms
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,253+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / UN OCHA, Mar 18 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803.
